Basketball Explainer

The Euro Step

Basketball's slickest finishing move, broken down five ways: the path, the physics of why it works, rookie-vs-pro, a 3D view, and the footwork. Interactive, for newcomers.

freeCodeCamp algorithms explainer

freeCodeCamp Daily Challenges — visual walkthroughs

Interactive, step-through explainers for 9 freeCodeCamp daily coding challenges — the problem, the visual intuition, and an idiomatic TypeScript solution for each.

FROM — A Field Guide (Season 1, spoiler-safe)

A spoiler-safe field guide to Season 1 of the TV show FROM — the trapped residents, their survival rules, the town's key locations, the monsters, and the season's arc.

Jujutsu (jj) — the pitch, the catches

What Jujutsu (jj) genuinely buys you over Git — the real wins and the rough edges that bite — so you can judge whether the switch is worth it.
